purpose: Seed weights for UNFOLD NPC opening, defense, recovery, and selective reading.

net04.label: jay
net04.reason: High first-player win rate and easy king-capture route creation.

net04m.label: mirror-jay
net04m.reason: Similar diagonal route pressure to jay.

net06.label: cross
net06.reason: Creates central pressure and king-zone influence at the same time.

net01.label: tee
net01.reason: Wide connection surface makes base-center pressure easy.

net08.label: saw
net08.reason: Realm-knight king captures were frequent in the full kifu review.

notes: Treat the third file ahead of home base as the defensive band.
Penalize overextended friendly fragments because they can become enemy roads.
Score the defensive band by friendly pieces, friendly attacks, and edge contact with home territory.

recoveryTriggers: A friendly fragment becomes an enemy landing road near the king.
Recovery removes an overextended road from the home base.
Recovery improves the defensive band or king-zone control.
Recovery increases options when the hand is nearly empty.
